docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT WEAVER, SUE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $665.34 FILED BY DALE, ELIJAH AS TO DEFENDANT WEAVER, SUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DALE, ELIJAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEAVER, SUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
